DiaryEntry.title: Diary Entry
DiaryEntry.description: A diary entry representing a planted flower/plant in the child's garden.

dateStr.description: The date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

type.description: The emoji representing the plant type.

content.description: The text content of the diary entry.

ParentAction.title: Parent Action
ParentAction.description: An action taken by the parent (e.g., watering, leaving a heart).

/users/{userId}/diaries/{diaryId}.description: Diary entries for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/actions/{actionId}.description: Parent actions for a specific user.
